J0200_CNDCT_PAIN_ASMT_CD J0200 Should Pain Assessment be Conducted Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether or not a shoulder pain assessment interview could be conducted. -=Not assessed/no information
0=No(resident is rarely/never understood)
1=Yes
^=Blank(skip pattern)
337 J0300_PAIN_CD J0300_PAIN_CD J0300 Pain Assessment Interview: Pain Presence Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident has had pain or hurting in the last five days. -=Not assessed/no
